title: Ubiquiti U-Cable-Patch-RJ45-BK-50, UniFi Ethernet Patch Cable, 0,22m, Cat6, Black (50psc)
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Patch cables / Cat.6 (Color)
description: UniFi Ethernet patch cable UC-Patch-RJ45-BK-50 in black color and 22cm length is ideal for connecting (not only) UniFi devices in racks in the immediate vicinity. Ultra thin design 3mm. Made in white, blue and black colour The cable has passed the certification test TIA-568-B.2 Cat6 Channel test by the Fluke The package contains 50 pcs of these cables GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
